description_long: This is a tall, rectangular wooden wardrobe with a dark, weathered finish and visible signs of age and wear, such as discoloration and patches of grime. The front features two large, panelled doors with subtle decorative molding and a pair of small, round handles at the center. The sides are plain, with faint cross-bracing details and a similarly distressed surface. The top is flat and slightly overhangs the main body, providing a potential surface for placing small items. The base is sturdy, with a slightly protruding plinth and four short feet. The overall appearance suggests it is a robust, utilitarian piece of furniture, likely found in older urban environments, garages, or storage areas.
description: A tall, weathered wooden wardrobe with two panelled doors and a distressed, dark finish. It features subtle molding, small round handles, and a sturdy base.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large panelled doors with decorative molding and small round handles at the center.
description_view_1: Side view revealing a plain, rectangular surface with faint cross-bracing and a distressed finish.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a flat, undecorated back panel with visible wear and discoloration.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with plain panels and cross-bracing details.
